claim_text: Scene Graph Transformers reports a limitation or cost signal relevant to targeted gap analysis.
interpretation: The span can motivate a gap candidate within Graph reasoning and planning, but it is not an idea.
limitations: Deterministic Phase 3 extraction; no LLM semantic adjudication was applied.
Card supports gap mapping only, not final idea generation.
